\section*{Algebraic controllability: hover vs descent}
State order: $x=[p_x,p_z,v_x,v_z,\theta,\omega,m]^\top$; controls $u=[\delta T,\tau]^\top$; $\mathcal{C}=[B,AB,\ldots,A^{6}B]\in\mathbb{R}^{7\times 14}$.

\subsection*{Trim snapshot $t=0.0\,\mathrm{s}$}
Descent trim: $m=20.00\,\mathrm{kg}$, $v_x^\ast=40.0\,\mathrm{m/s}$, $v_z^\ast=-8.0\,\mathrm{m/s}$.

Descent LTV & 7/7 & 0.98 & 0.0489 & 0 \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table}
